description: Walk on air with these Air Max 180 shoes from nike. With it's unique protective construction and incredible cushioning, you can take your game to the next level. These performance shoes are stylish enough to be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Perforated uppers with woven textile overlays for maximum breathability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and lightly padded tongue for greater comfort Swoosh logo appliqued on the sides and brand patch transferred onto the tongue Brand name embroidered onto the back of the collar Midsole Phylon midsole with Max Air 180 unit in the heel for maximum impact protection and superior cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole with waffle pattern for traction and durability Flex grooves for greater flexibilty of the feet shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
